Patch Set 1: Code-Review-2

Rough draft to get ball started on interface between scheduler and placement controllers, ONAP aai registration and hpa placement plugin. 

Any and all feedback welcomed. As I think more about it and respond to comments I'll update the patch.

> Patch Set 13:

Patch Set 14:

how to test it?

Patch Set 14:

> Patch Set 14:
> 
> how to test it?

Hi Haibin, since these are just interfaces without implementation code, testing would be moot. The purpose of this patch was to have a collective conversation and agree on how the hpa plugin and scheduler would talk. Implementation code and testing code is intended to be added in a later patch. However, as of now, Srini+Ritu changed the design, so that hpa placement would be done by a separate micro-service using gRPC. This patch might be abandoned as such.

Patch Set 14:

> Patch Set 14:
> 
> > Patch Set 14:
> > 
> > how to test it?
> 
> Hi Haibin, since these are just interfaces without implementation code, testing would be moot. The purpose of this patch was to have a collective conversation and agree on how the hpa plugin and scheduler would talk. Implementation code and testing code is intended to be added in a later patch. However, as of now, Srini+Ritu changed the design, so that hpa placement would be done by a separate micro-service using gRPC. This patch might be abandoned as such.

ok, got it.
